start.speaker: Gatekeeper
start.text: Enter with joy. The King has watched every step of your road.
start.text_zh: 欢欢喜喜地进来吧。你这一路的每一步，王都看在眼里。

text_variants.text: Enter with joy. Faithful is already within — he ran ahead of you through the fire, and he is not forgotten here. Every step of your road was watched.
text_variants.text_zh: 欢欢喜喜地进来吧。忠信已经在里面了——他穿过烈火先你而行，在这里没有被忘记。你这一路的每一步，都被看在眼里。

text_variants.text: Enter with joy. We saw you stand in the Valley when Apollyon straddled the whole breadth of the way — and you did not stand by your own strength. That is why you stand here now.
text_variants.text_zh: 欢欢喜喜地进来吧。我们看见你在屈辱谷中站立，那时亚玻伦拦住整条道路——而你不是靠自己的力量站住的。正因如此，你今日才站在这里。

text_variants.text: Enter with joy — and not alone. The one called Hopeful came because he saw the road in you. The King has watched every step you both walked.
text_variants.text_zh: 欢欢喜喜地进来吧——而且不是独自一人。那名叫盼望的，因在你身上看见了这条路才同行。你们二人所走的每一步，王都看在眼里。

final.text: The burden was gone. The road was finished. The welcome remained.
final.text_zh: 重担已经卸下。道路已经走完。那欢迎，长存。
